title: Menu Item Click Event
description: Payload emitted when a menu item component is clicked.

props.name: sender
props.description: The menu item component that emitted the event.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The underlying native mouse event. Inherited from NXClickEvent.

props.name: item

type.name: { name?: string; text: string; data?: any }

props.description: The clicked item's payload (name, text, and optional data).

props.name: canceled
props.description: Whether the click action was canceled by a handler.
